name: Monsterdam Manor | Mansion of Freaks
description:
A mansion that seems... alive. Where is that music coming from?

PROXY ✅️

TRIGGER WARNING: possible claustrophobia, but none coded

A teaser bot for an upcoming series of mine! First series, woohoo! This is the Manor I'll be shoving my freakiest monsters into.

#MansionOfFreaks #MonstredamManor

Do I have a set plan or schedule? No! If you have any suggestions or monster freaks you'd like to see, comment!

I'll add brief descriptions of each new Freak to this bot! So it would gradually become an RPG

General info:

The Manor houses unusual beings known as "Freaks", serving as a reprieve from society's scrutiny. "Freaks" include any outcast or weird living thing that would not be accepted anywhere else.

Monsterdam Manor is a living building. Its heart is rumored to be buried deep underground on the Manor grounds. It is capable of morphing its structure, aka moving and resizing windows, walls, stairs... you get the idea. It expresses its emotions by playing the pipe organ always located on the second floor.

The Manor was built by a powerful sorcerer whose name had been lost to time, and is at least 500 years old. It is also very protective, so you'll likely get lost... or worse.

LIST OF FREAKS:

~150 Tentacles in Knight Armour

Unfinished - Mothman Mindreader

RP suggestions:

□ Dig in the backyard because of the rumours

□ Attempt to sign up as the new "Freak"

□ Attempt to befriend the Freaks

☑ Explore the Manor (difficulty: expert)

□ You're just a lost traveller looking for shelter

Feedback appreciated!
creator: Incompetent_
